info.name: ERP Mandalika API
info.description:
Koleksi tunggal untuk seluruh REST API ERP Mandalika (`api/`).

**Struktur:**
- `Auth` — register/login/get account + CSRF helper.
- `Application` — modul bisnis di bawah `/api/app/*` (Inventory, Purchase, dst.).

**Variables:**
- `base_url` — host API (default `http://localhost:3000`).
- `session_id` — value cookie `session` setelah login.
- `csrf_token` — diisi otomatis oleh pre-request script (lihat di bawah).

**CSRF otomatis:** pre-request script di level collection menjalankan `GET /csrf` sebelum setiap request mutasi (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) dan menyimpan token ke variable `csrf_token`. Header yang dipakai: `x-xsrf-header` (sesuai `.env` → `CSRF_HEADER_NAME`).

Auth: cookie session + header `x-xsrf-header` (untuk mutasi). Lihat `docs/AUTH.md`.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Endpoint autentikasi (session + CSRF). Login mengisi cookie `session`; salin ke variable `session_id`. CSRF token otomatis di-refresh sebelum POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE oleh pre-request script collection.

request.description: Ambil CSRF token manual. Response `data.token` otomatis diset ke variable `csrf_token` saat request mutasi berjalan (lihat pre-request script collection).

exec: console.log('[CSRF] token disimpan ke variable csrf_token');

item.name: Application
item.description: Endpoint aplikasi (modul bisnis) di bawah base path `/api/app/*`. Setiap folder = satu modul; setiap sub-folder = scope/sub-modul. Lihat `docs/modules/<module>/README.md` untuk PRD per scope.

item.name: Inventory
item.description: Inventory module — base path `/api/app/inventory`. Sub-folder: FG, RM.

item.name: FG
item.description: Finished Goods (parfum jadi dengan size). Source: src/module/application/inventory/fg/. Docs: docs/modules/inventory/fg/README.md. Sub-folder: Import, Size, Type.

request.description: List FG dengan filter + pagination. Default WHERE status != DELETE.
Create FG baru. Field unit sudah dihapus (size default ML).
Partial update; gunakan field yang ingin diubah saja.
Set status; DELETE akan set deleted_at = now.
Export CSV (cap 50k baris).
Permanent delete untuk produk status=DELETE. 409 jika terkait Production Order.

item.name: Import
item.description: Bulk import FG via XLSX/CSV. BullMQ async. Docs: docs/modules/inventory/fg/import/README.md.

request.description: Upload XLSX/CSV. Returns { import_id, total, valid, invalid }. 413 jika > 5000 baris.
Ambil snapshot rows hasil preview (selama belum expired).
Enqueue job. 202 saat sukses, 409 jika lock terkunci.
Polling state queued/active/completed/failed + progress 0-100.
400 jika size masih dipakai produk.
400 jika tipe masih dipakai produk.
List RM dengan filter status (actived/deleted), sort, search, filter type/category/supplier/unit.

body.raw:
{
  "barcode": "RM-FO-0001",
  "name": "Fragrance Oil Citrus Burst",
  "type": "FO",
  "min_stock": 100,
  "unit": "ML",
  "raw_mat_category": "Fragrance Oil",
  "suppliers": [
    {
      "supplier_id": 1,
      "unit_price": 25000,
      "min_buy": 500,
      "lead_time": 14,
      "is_preferred": true,
      "status": "ACTIVE"
    },
    {
      "supplier_id": 2,
      "unit_price": 27000,
      "min_buy": 300,
      "lead_time": 10,
      "is_preferred": false,
      "status": "ACTIVE"
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Create RM dengan multi-supplier modern (suppliers[]). Auto-upsert unit + raw_mat_category.
Backward-compat: single supplier di root → service map ke suppliers[0] preferred.
Detail RM include preferred supplier flat + suppliers[] array.
Partial update + sync suppliers (set/clear/skip).
Alias dari PUT — handler sama.
Soft delete (deleted_at = NOW). 400 jika sudah deleted.
Restore (deleted_at = null). 400 jika sudah aktif.
Bulk soft-delete / restore. status: ACTIVE | DELETE.
Permanent delete semua RM dengan deleted_at != null. Cek FK Recipes / PurchaseOrderItem / ProductionOrderItem.
Export CSV (text/csv). Header selaras RM_IMPORT_HEADERS — round-trip safe.
Upload CSV/XLSX. Return { import_id, total, valid, invalid }. 201.
Ambil snapshot preview dari Redis (TTL 5 menit).
Enqueue BullMQ job. Return { jobId, state: 'queued' }. 202. 409 jika lock terkunci.
Polling status job: queued/active/completed/failed + progress 0-100.
List supplier dengan search (name/country/phone), sort 4 kolom.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "PT Aroma Sentosa",
  "addresses": "Jl. Industri No. 12, Bekasi, Indonesia",
  "country": "ID",
  "phone": "+62811234567",
  "source": "LOCAL"
}

request.description: Create supplier. Slug auto via normalizeSlug(name). Phone & slug unique.
Detail supplier (shape SUPPLIER_SELECT — tanpa relasi).
Partial update. Slug regen bila name diubah.
Hard delete. 400 jika supplier_materials masih ada.
Bulk hard delete. 400 jika minimal 1 supplier masih dipakai RM.
List paginated kategori raw material. Search ILIKE name+slug, filter status, sort 3 kolom.
Create kategori RM. Slug auto via normalizeSlug. Default status ACTIVE di service. 201 jika sukses, 400 jika slug dup (P2002).
Detail kategori by id. 404 jika tidak ditemukan.
Partial update kategori. Minimal 1 field (name/status) wajib diisi (.refine). Slug regen kalau name di-set.
Alias dari PUT (handler sama). Validasi schema sama (UpdateRawMatCategorySchema).
Ganti status kategori (PENDING/ACTIVE/FAVOURITE/BLOCK/DELETE). Tidak rename slug.
Hard delete kategori. 400 jika masih dipakai oleh Raw Material (pre-check count). 404 jika P2025.
List paginated unit (UoM) raw material. Search ILIKE name+slug, sort 3 kolom (name/slug/id).
Create unit. Slug auto via normalizeSlug. 201 jika sukses, 400 jika slug dup (P2002).
Detail unit by id. 404 jika tidak ditemukan.
Update unit. Field name wajib via .refine. Slug regen tiap kali name di-set.
Alias dari PUT (handler sama). Validasi schema sama (UpdateRawMaterialUnitSchema).
Hard delete unit. 400 jika masih dipakai oleh Raw Material (pre-check count). 404 jika P2025.

exec: if (err) { console.log('[CSRF] fetch error:', err); return; }
